reviews.review_msg: Loving her teaching style, she could explain the concept easily, and it was funny and comfortable to take a course with her! Highly recommended
She is clever and knowledgeable; SFU is a treasure to have her as an instructor!
Best prof ever met at Beedie!!!

One of those professors who is passionate about her research. She makes learning easy by breaking any complex topics into simple, easy-to-understand explanations. Very helpful and approachable too, but lectures can get a bit dry at times, especially if it's an afternoon lecture.
Hands down the best professor! Teaches with clarity, passion, and keeps the class engaged. She makes learning truly enjoyable.

Professor Parvathy's teaching style focuses on readings and class discussions, which means that she highly appreciates any inputs from the class. The readings are not too long, but be prepared to come to class having done some reading and participate. Grading mostly by 2 midterms (no memorization needed), final group project, and participation.
